title: Agents
subtitleMulti: Manage and collaborate with multiple AI agents
deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete agent "{{name}}"? The agent configuration will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
noAgentsDesc: Create a new agent to enable multi-agent collaboration.

form.title: Create New Agent
form.idHint: Unique identifier. Letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.
form.name: Display Name
form.modelHint: Leave empty to use the default model. Use model aliases, not date-suffixed IDs.
form.errorIdInvalid: Agent ID must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores
form.errorIdReserved: "main" is reserved and cannot be used as an agent ID

wizard.basicDesc: Set the basic identity for your agent. The ID is used as a unique identifier.
wizard.modelDesc: Choose the AI model for this agent. Different models suit different tasks.
wizard.modelAliasHint: Use model aliases (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-5), not date-suffixed versions.
wizard.soulDesc: Define this agent's role, personality, and working rules in SOUL.md — the soul of the agent.
wizard.soulHint: SOUL.md is the core file that differentiates agents. It defines who the agent is and how it should behave.

soul.editDesc: SOUL.md defines the agent's role, personality, and working principles. Changes take effect on the next conversation.
